title: heterolamium debile var. cardiophyllum
intro: Heterolamium debile var. cardiophyllum, also known as a type of flowering plant, is a variety of the Heterolamium debile species found in China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory issues. Heterolamium debile var. cardiophyllum is traditionally prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, although I couldn't find specific information on its herbal preparations.
